title: Frontend Engineer Specialist Mock Test
description: Professional assessment for engineers focusing on HTML5 APIs, advanced CSS layout (Grid/Flexbox), performance, and web standards.

questions.text: In the CSS Box Model, what does 'box-sizing: border-box' ensure?
options: Padding and border are added outside the set width
The width and height properties include content, padding, and border
The margin is included in the width calculation
The content area grows automatically to fit the padding
questions.explanation: Border-box makes layout math easier by including padding and borders within the element's specified total width and height.

questions.text: Which CSS property is used to create a staggered grid layout where items can span multiple rows and columns without fixed heights?
questions.explanation: CSS Grid is a two-dimensional layout system, whereas Flexbox is primarily one-dimensional.

questions.text: What is the 'Specificity' weight of a single ID selector in CSS?
questions.explanation: In the specificity hierarchy (Inline, ID, Class/Attribute, Element), an ID has a weight of 100 (or 0,1,0,0).

questions.text: What does the HTML5 'defer' attribute do when loading a script?
options: Executes the script immediately, blocking HTML parsing
Downloads the script in parallel and executes it only after the document has been fully parsed
Downloads and executes the script as soon as it is available, pausing parsing
Prevents the script from running until a user interaction occurs
questions.explanation: 'defer' ensures the script runs in order and only after the DOM is ready, without blocking the initial parse.

questions.text: Which CSS unit is relative to the font-size of the root element (usually <html>)?
questions.explanation: 'rem' stands for 'root em'. Unlike 'em', it doesn't compound based on parent element font sizes.

questions.text: What is the purpose of 'aria-live' in HTML?
options: To inform screen readers that content in an area has updated dynamically
To show a live video feed
To prevent the page from refreshing
questions.explanation: aria-live (polite/assertive) is critical for accessibility when content updates without a page reload.

questions.text: In Flexbox, which property is used to align items along the cross-axis?
questions.explanation: justify-content handles the main-axis, while align-items handles the cross-axis.

questions.text: What is the 'BEM' methodology in CSS used for?
options: Providing a structured naming convention for classes to improve maintainability
questions.explanation: BEM (Block Element Modifier) helps prevent style leakage and creates a clear relationship between HTML and CSS.

questions.text: Which HTML5 tag is used to specify a set of images for different screen resolutions or formats?
questions.explanation: The <picture> element, along with <source> and the 'srcset' attribute, enables responsive image handling.

questions.text: What is a 'Reflow' in browser rendering?
options: The process of recalculating the positions and geometries of elements in the document
Changing the color of a button
questions.explanation: Reflow (or layout) is a performance-heavy operation triggered by changes to DOM structure or styles that affect geometry.
